dataflow.description: What-if scenario planning: pick Boston buildings, edit their heights, and compare baseline vs. modified vs. delta height views with Autark.

nodes.goal: Load OSM buildings, surface, and parks for Boston via the Autark spatial database.
Annotate buildings with footprint area and a numeric baselineHeight for the what-if comparison.
Picking-enabled baseline map: select buildings to include in the what-if scenario.
Recompute building heights for picked buildings using the height multiplier widget.
Visualize the modified scenario with picked buildings raised by the multiplier.
Standalone baseline view (no picking) for side-by-side visual comparison.
Highlight which buildings changed and by how much (modified height minus baseline).

dataflow.name: DefaultWorkflow
